Scenarios.Name: ReadObjects
Scenarios.Notes: Automatic execution policy.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjects.Sequential
Scenarios.Notes: Forced sequential range conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjects.Parallel
Scenarios.Notes: Forced parallel range conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjectsAs
Scenarios.Notes: Typed object materialization with automatic execution policy.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjectsAs.Sequential
Scenarios.Notes: Typed object materialization with forced sequential range conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjectsAs.Parallel
Scenarios.Notes: Typed object materialization with forced parallel range conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjectsAs.CustomConverterFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Typed object materialization through a custom converter hook that falls back to built-in conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjectsAs.CustomConverterCultureFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Typed object materialization through a custom converter fallback with non-invariant culture.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjectsStreamAs
Scenarios.Notes: Streaming typed object materialization without full result buffering.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjectsStreamAs.CustomConverterFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Streaming typed object materialization through a custom converter hook that falls back to built-in conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadObjectsStreamAs.CustomConverterCultureFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Streaming typed object materialization through a custom converter fallback with non-invariant culture.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRange
Scenarios.Notes: Dense 2D array read with automatic execution policy.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRange.Sequential
Scenarios.Notes: Dense 2D array read with forced sequential conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRange.Parallel
Scenarios.Notes: Dense 2D array read with forced parallel conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeAsDataTable
Scenarios.Notes: Automatic execution policy.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeAsDataTable.Sequential
Scenarios.Notes: Forced sequential range conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeAsDataTable.Parallel
Scenarios.Notes: Forced parallel range conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeAsDataTable.HeadersNoInference
Scenarios.Notes: Header row with type inference disabled.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeAsDataTable.NoHeadersNoInference
Scenarios.Notes: Generated columns with type inference disabled.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeAsDataTable.MixedTypeInference
Scenarios.Notes: Infer object columns from mixed-type data.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeAsDataTable.CustomConverterFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Sequential DataTable read through a custom converter hook that falls back to built-in conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeAsDataTable.CustomConverterCultureFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Sequential DataTable read through a custom converter fallback with non-invariant culture.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeStream
Scenarios.Notes: Streaming row chunks with automatic execution policy.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeStream.Sequential
Scenarios.Notes: Streaming row chunks with forced sequential conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeStream.Parallel
Scenarios.Notes: Streaming row chunks with forced parallel conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeStream.CustomConverterFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Streaming row chunks through a custom converter hook that falls back to built-in conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRangeStream.CustomConverterCultureFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Streaming row chunks through a custom converter fallback with non-invariant culture.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRows.Dense
Scenarios.Notes: Dense row enumeration over the same workbook payload.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRows.Dense.CustomConverterFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Dense row enumeration through a custom converter hook that falls back to built-in conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRows.Dense.CustomConverterCultureFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Dense row enumeration through a custom converter fallback with non-invariant culture.

Scenarios.Name: ReadColumn.Dense
Scenarios.Notes: Dense single-column enumeration over the same workbook payload.

Scenarios.Name: ReadColumn.Dense.CustomConverterFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Dense single-column enumeration through a custom converter hook that falls back to built-in conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadColumn.Dense.CustomConverterCultureFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Dense single-column enumeration through a custom converter fallback with non-invariant culture.

Scenarios.Name: GetUsedRangeA1.Cached
Scenarios.Notes: Repeated used-range lookup through ExcelDocumentReader after the worksheet dimension has been resolved.

Scenarios.Name: GetHeaderMap.LargeUsedRange
Scenarios.Notes: Build the header lookup map from the first used row of a larger worksheet.

Scenarios.Name: GetHeaderMap.LoadedRebuild
Scenarios.Notes: Rebuild the header lookup map on an already loaded worksheet after cache invalidation.

Scenarios.Name: GetHeaderMap.LoadedSharedStrings
Scenarios.Notes: Rebuild headers when the worksheet has many unique shared strings below the header row.

Scenarios.Name: TryGetColumnIndexByHeader.Cached
Scenarios.Notes: Repeated cached header lookup without exposing the mutable header map.

Scenarios.Name: HeaderOps.SetByHeader.Cached
Scenarios.Notes: Repeated header-based data-row updates through the normal SetByHeader API.

Scenarios.Name: LoadedText.FindFirst.SharedStrings
Scenarios.Notes: Repeated loaded-sheet text search over cells backed by many shared strings.

Scenarios.Name: LoadedText.ReplaceAll.SharedStrings
Scenarios.Notes: Batch replacement over a loaded worksheet with many shared-string cells.

Scenarios.Name: HeaderOps.AutoFilterByHeaders.BatchMap
Scenarios.Notes: Repeated multi-header AutoFilter updates using one internal cached header map per operation.

Scenarios.Name: ReadColumn.LargeSparse
Scenarios.Notes: Sparse A1:A100001 read with only the first and last rows populated.

Scenarios.Name: ReadColumn.LargeSparse.CustomConverterFallback
Scenarios.Notes: Sparse A1:A100001 read through a custom converter hook that falls back to built-in conversion.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRows.LargeSparse
Scenarios.Notes: Sparse A1:A100001 row read with only the first and last rows populated.

Scenarios.Name: ReadRows
Scenarios.Notes: Worksheet row iteration over the same workbook payload.
